payload.answer: The new statement appears to supersede the existing memory: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new statement says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new employment as replacing the old current-employer memory; keep_both if both should remain because the situation is ambiguous or time-scoped; reject_new if the new statement is incorrect or should not be stored; edit if the wording needs correction before saving.
